title: Peppery Light Pine Nuts Stir-Fry
description: A light and peppery Norwegian dish featuring pine nuts for a lazy Sunday meal, this recipe is kosher-friendly.

ingredients.name: Pine Nuts
ingredients.notes: Coarse or unshelled pine nuts work best.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Minced finely for a light, peppery flavor.

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes
ingredients.notes: Use sparingly to keep it light and mild.

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for a bright, zesty kick.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For lightly cooking the pine nuts to enhance their flavor.

ingredients.name: Chopped Dill (Optional)
ingredients.notes: A touch of freshness and another optional ingredient.

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the minced garlic, red pepper flakes, lemon juice, and olive oil until well combined.
In a frying pan or wok set over medium heat, gently toast the pine nuts for about 1-2 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Drizzle in the prepared marinade, tossing rapidly to coat evenly.
Add any optional dill at this stage for extra freshness and texture.
Serve immediately while still warm and vibrant with flavor.
